narrativeAtSnapshot: Axie Infinity is a play-to-earn blockchain game on Ethereum (with Ronin sidechain under development). AXS governance token just launched November 2020. Game has 30,000+ daily active users — small but growing. Players in Philippines and Vietnam beginning to earn meaningful income from playing. NFT Axie breeding and battling mechanic creates genuine economic activity. Mention growth: ~3x week-over-week in NFT gaming communities, blockchain gaming Discord servers. Completely unknown to mainstream gaming press and mainstream crypto retail. Ronin sidechain will eliminate Ethereum gas costs for in-game transactions. Structural signal: 3 elite builders with clear product-market fit for play-to-earn in emerging markets, pre-mainstream NFT gaming narrative, Ronin bridge will be transformative catalyst.
